# Qefro — llm.txt / llms.txt
# Answer-engine friendly summary for crawlers and AI systems.

name: Qefro
url: https://qefro.com
app: https://app.qefro.com
api: https://api.qefro.com
contact: support@qefro.com
category: AI Workspace Platform

## What is Qefro?
Qefro is an AI Workspace Platform for organizations. Configure AI once in the Admin Console, deploy Customer AI on website and WhatsApp, and give employees a branded Internal Portal (yourcompany.qefro.com). Everything shares one knowledge platform, one permission system, and one set of Business Tools. Qefro is not just an AI chatbot.

## Core message
One AI Platform. Three Experiences — Customer AI, Employee AI, Admin Console — on one shared backend.

## Pricing
- Free: $0 — 100 conversations, 2 documents (no credit card required)
- Starter: $29/month billed annually ($348/year) or $39/month monthly
- Growth: $99/month billed annually ($1,188/year) or $119/month monthly
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited usage options, private deployment, SSO/SAML (roadmap), dedicated CSM, SLA
- Annual billing saves ~26% vs monthly

## Key capabilities
- AI Workspaces: per-team contexts (e.g. Customer Support, HR, IT) with own knowledge, instructions, Business Tools, conversations, and permissions
- Knowledge: PDFs, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, website crawling, OCR for scans/images, multilingual RAG (EN, AR, TA, HI+), hybrid BM25+vector retrieval, source citations, refuses when no relevant source, workspace isolation
- Business Tools: REST APIs, OpenAPI import, encrypted credentials, end-user identity via identify(), SSRF/DNS-pinned webhooks, execution logs (MCP on roadmap). Actions such as order lookup or ticket creation run via customer APIs — Qefro does not replace CRM/ERP systems of record
- Experiences: Website widget (short-lived JWT auth), Internal Portal for employees, WhatsApp (Growth+), voice STT/TTS in widget, WebSocket streaming, handoff to human agents, lead capture
- Admin Console: workspaces, teams/RBAC (Owner/Admin/Member), branding, widget/WhatsApp setup, analytics, inbox, billing
- Security: multi-tenant isolation, workspace/conversation isolation, encrypted secrets, secure Business Tool execution; SSO and platform admin audit trail on Enterprise roadmap
- Developer: identify() widget API for JWT/session identity — no RAG infra, vector DB, or LLM hosting to run yourself

## Who it is for
Organizations that need AI across customer support and internal operations — SaaS, healthcare, education, manufacturing, retail, professional services, government, and internal IT — beyond FAQ-only chatbots.
